raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 708 establishes a special permit for operating certain off-road motorcycles at sanctioned events in California.",
    "The new program introduced by SB 708 will replace the Red Sticker registration program that ended in 2021.",
    "SB 708 provides a cost-effective, streamlined identification decal for competition motorcycles at sanctioned events on public lands.",
    "The end of the Red Sticker program in 2021 has created confusion regarding regulations for off-highway vehicle competitions in California.",
    "The uncertainty caused by the lack of a new program for OHV competitions negatively impacts local businesses and rural economies.",
    "Funding for environmental work and law enforcement has been lost due to the uncertainty surrounding OHV competition regulations."
